creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
linimon     2010-06-17 23:50:59 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    print/lgrind         Makefile distinfo 
  Log:
  Clean up this port so it deinstalls cleanly.  Remove one level of
  directory from the distfiles directory.  (This will also silence distfile
  cleanup on pointyhat, which is where I came across it.)
  
  PR:             ports/147927
  Submitted by:   myself
  Approved by:    maintainer
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.17      +35 -21    ports/print/lgrind/Makefile
  1.7       +96 -60    ports/print/lgrind/distinfo
